pi_items.source: Task setup and description specify the user's Documents folder.
Task instructions ask the user to name the file 'deep_dive_profile.png' with potential appended numbers.
Typical Subsurface profile graph exports are well over 15KB (typically 30-150KB) given the graph complexity and PNG encoding.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive log data sourced from the official Subsurface GitHub repository (SampleDivesV2.ssrf). The instructions correctly specify exporting to '/home/ga/Documents/' with a filename matching '*deep_dive_profile*'. Legitimate profile exports from Subsurface easily exceed the 15KB minimum threshold. Note that while the task prompt describes Dive #4 as the deepest at ~31.4m, the dataset actually contains 29 dives with Dive #90 being the deepest (46.48m) and Dive #232 having a max depth of 31.52m.
